---
title: "Tutorial 1"
toc: false
---

Tutorial 1 introduced the subject and provided an opportunity to start practicing writing and running basic mathematical R code. The tutorial questions and answers are provided below; if you have any questions about these please post on the canvas discussion board or ask a member of staff in the next lesson.

## Tutorial questions and answers

{{< pdf "resources/assign/tutorial_1.pdf" >}}

{{< pdf "resources/solution/tutorial_1.pdf" >}}
